ShopItems.Title: ROCKET LEAGUE PARIS MAJOR
ShopItems.Disclaimer: Every purchase in the Paris Major tab feeds directly to the competitors and teams in the 2026 Rocket League Paris Major. Net sales are split equally between two pools: player performance awards and team performance awards.
